title: Senior Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!
